fields.description: The full legal name of the limited partnership fund as stated in the agreement.
fields.examples: Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P.; Apex Growth Equity Fund III, L.P.

fields.description: The full legal name of the general partner entity responsible for managing the fund.
fields.examples: Horizon Capital Management LLC; Apex Fund Advisors GP, LLC

fields.description: Annual management fee rate charged to limited partners during the investment period, expressed as a percentage.
The percentage of net profits allocated to the general partner as performance compensation.
The minimum annualized return rate that must be achieved by limited partners before the general partner participates in profit sharing.
The total duration of the fund from initial closing to final liquidation, typically expressed in years.
The period during which the general partner may call capital from limited partners for new investments.
The state or jurisdiction whose laws govern the partnership agreement.
fields.examples: Delaware; Cayman Islands; State of New York
